summary: Iteration 11 Testing: Admin Theme Customization (Aspetto Gestionale) and Dark Theme Batch Fix across admin pages. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). All 16 frontend features tested and working (100%).

issues: 404 errors for some resources (likely static assets) - does not affect functionality

passed_tests: BACKEND: Admin login successful with admin@brunomelito.it
BACKEND: GET /api/admin-theme requires authentication (403)
BACKEND: PUT /api/admin-theme requires authentication (403)
BACKEND: GET /api/admin-theme returns theme config with auth
BACKEND: PUT /api/admin-theme saves primary_color correctly
BACKEND: PUT /api/admin-theme saves full config (primary_color, accent_color, font_family, font_size, border_radius)
BACKEND: Admin theme reset to default values works
BACKEND: GET /api/settings returns user settings
BACKEND: GET /api/clients returns client list
BACKEND: GET /api/services returns service list
BACKEND: GET /api/operators returns operator list
BACKEND: GET /api/nav-config returns navigation config
FRONTEND: Login page dark theme - readable inputs and gold Accedi button
FRONTEND: Settings/Impostazioni page text fully readable with dark theme
FRONTEND: Settings page 'Aspetto Gestionale' section visible with all controls
FRONTEND: Color pickers visible (Colore Primario #D4AF37, Colore Secondario #0EA5E9)
FRONTEND: Font selector visible (Sistema, Inter, Playfair Display, Poppins, Montserrat, DM Sans)
FRONTEND: Font size options visible (Piccolo, Medio Default, Grande, Extra Grande)
FRONTEND: Border radius options visible (Nessuno, Piccolo, Medio Default, Grande, Molto Grande)
FRONTEND: Admin theme font change applies in real-time (Poppins)
FRONTEND: Admin theme font size change applies in real-time (Grande=16px)
FRONTEND: 'Salva Aspetto' saves theme to backend and persists after page reload
FRONTEND: 'Ripristina Default' resets all values
FRONTEND: Theme loads at startup via Layout.jsx (--gold CSS variable set)
FRONTEND: Clients page (/clients) text readable with dark theme
FRONTEND: Services page (/services) text readable with dark theme
FRONTEND: Planning page (/planning) calendar and appointments readable
FRONTEND: Report Incassi page (/incassi) text readable with dark theme
FRONTEND: Dashboard page text readable with dark theme
FRONTEND: No JavaScript console errors on admin pages (excluding 404s)
critical_code_review_comments: SettingsPage.jsx properly implements 'Aspetto Gestionale' card with all customization options
Admin theme API endpoints (GET/PUT /api/admin-theme) in stats.py work correctly with MongoDB persistence
Layout.jsx correctly loads admin theme at startup via loadAdminTheme() in useEffect
Dark theme batch fix uses CSS variables like text-[var(--text-primary)], bg-[var(--bg-card)], etc.
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Theme persistence works correctly - saved config loads after page reload
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 fully tested: Dark theme batch fix applied across 23+ admin pages using CSS variables (--text-primary, --bg-card, --bg-elevated, --gold). New 'Aspetto Gestionale' section in Settings allows customizing: primary_color, accent_color, font_family (6 options), font_size (4 options), border_radius (5 options). Admin theme saved to MongoDB via /api/admin-theme endpoint. Theme loads at app startup in Layout.jsx useEffect. All admin pages (Settings, Clients, Services, Planning, Dashboard, Report Incassi) have readable text with proper contrast on dark background.
